<!--
Thank you for your contribution to the Verfix website! 
Please fill out the template below so we can review your PR efficiently.
-->

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/ticket. Include motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please mark the options that are relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 **Documentation update** (additions or corrections to docs)
- [ ] 🎨 **Style/Theme** (CSS, layout, or cosmetic improvements)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** (improvements to page speeds, asset loading, etc.)
- [ ] 🧹 **Refactor** (code cleanup or restructuring without logical changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run a local build (`npm run build`) and verified it completes with zero errors.
- [ ] I have previewed the built site (`npm run preview`) to verify my changes visually.
- [ ] I have updated/added documentation if my change introduces new guides or references.
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) standards.

## Screenshots / Demos (if applicable)

Please add screenshots, screen recordings, or code block differences showing the visual change in both **Light Theme** and **Dark Theme** to ensure no regressions occur.
